commands.review_summary:
The PR routes Codex app-server compaction through native Codex thread compaction, leaves context engines in maintenance mode, passes context-engine owner metadata into Codex runtime hooks, and adds doctor/docs/tests/changelog coverage for ignored compaction overrides and Lossless migration.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high-confidence: current main lets an owning context engine compact before native Codex compaction, and the PR body plus live comment provide before/after Testbox and beta-run evidence for the OAuth `api.responses.write` failure path.
